title: Command Cockpit Overview HUD Slimline
summary: Trimmed the desktop Command Cockpit Overview lane header into a slimmer launch strip so the playable stage gets more first-screen space.
proof: Scoped the slimline to Command Cockpit Overview via the body detail-view state.
Hid duplicate bot event copy and the nested command matrix while preserving lane identity, stats, avatar, and route pulse.
Verified the live 1440x900 cockpit after the footer pin: no horizontal overflow and the stage footer rail remains inside the mounted stage.
